business.name: THE BUILDER OF CHOICE
business.tagline: When your garage door won't budge

hero.headline: *One call* fixes what's broken
hero.subheadline: Springs snap, openers die, tracks bend — we handle all of it

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every part, every problem
services_section.subheading: No matter what broke, we've seen it before

services.title: Spring Replacement
services.description: Torsion springs and extension springs. When they snap, your door won't lift.

services.title: Opener Repair
services.description: Motor issues, remote problems, safety sensor fixes. Get your automatic door working again.

services.title: Track & Roller Service
services.description: Bent tracks, worn rollers, alignment issues. Smooth operation starts here.

services.title: Cable Replacement
services.description: Frayed or snapped cables make your door dangerous. We replace them safely.

about.heading: Panama City's garage door repair team
about.body: We show up when we say we will. One call, one team, honest pricing.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we work
service_areas.subheading: Serving Panama City and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Ready to get that door working?
cta.body: Free estimate over the phone. No hidden fees, no surprises.
